scripts.build-dependencies: npm run build -w shared -w frameworks/react -w frameworks/vue -w frameworks/angular -w frameworks/svelte -w frameworks/vanillajs --if-present
scripts.dev-frameworks: npm run watch -w frameworks/react -w frameworks/vue -w frameworks/angular -w frameworks/svelte -w frameworks/vanillajs --if-present
scripts.dev: npm run generate-llms && concurrently -n "BACKEND,VIEWER,FRAMEWORKS" "npm run dev-backend" "npm run dev-viewer" "npm run dev-frameworks"
scripts.build-frameworks: npm run build -w frameworks/react -w frameworks/vue -w frameworks/angular -w frameworks/svelte -w frameworks/vanillajs --if-present
scripts.build: npm run generate-llms && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
